mapper.insert: insert into user_task_progress(user_id, task_code, period_key, current_value, target_value, status, last_source_event_id, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{taskCode}, #{periodKey}, 0, #{targetValue}, #{status}, #{lastSourceEventId}, current_timestamp)
mapper.update: update user_task_progress set current_value = #{currentValue}, status = #{status}, reached_at = #{reachedAt}, claimed_at = #{claimedAt}, reward_grant_id = #{rewardGrantId}, last_source_event_id = #{lastSourceEventId}, update_time = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
